[package]
name = "fusion_core"
version = "3.0.0"
edition = "2024" # Targeting latest stable Rust features
authors = ["Fusion Arch Team <support@quantumsecuretechnologies.co.uk>"]
description = "Supernova Runtime Kernel and HAFT Mesh Nodes"
publish = false # Private enterprise core

# --- Library Definition (The Kernel) ---
[lib]
name = "fusion_core"
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["lib"]

# --- Binary Definitions (The HAFT Mesh) ---
# We explicitly map the files in bin/ to executable names here.

[[bin]]
name = "haft_solver"
path = "bin/haft_solver.rs"
doc = false

[[bin]]
name = "haft_vault"
path = "bin/haft_vault.rs"
doc = false

[[bin]]
name = "haft_nexus"
path = "bin/haft_nexus.rs"
doc = false

[[bin]]
name = "haft_warden"
path = "bin/haft_warden.rs"
doc = false

# --- Dependencies ---
[dependencies]
# Async Runtime & Concurrency (Replacing Tokio)
crossbeam = "0.8"        # Channels for the Executor
futures-task = "0.3"     # ArcWake trait for Task management
parking_lot = "0.12"     # High-performance Mutex (used in Solver)
num_cpus = "1.0"         # Hardware detection

# Metal Drivers & IO
libc = "0.2"             # Raw syscalls (open, close)
io-uring = "0.6"         # Linux asynchronous I/O interface

# Cryptography (Hybrid PQC)
rand = "0.8"             # CSPRNG
sha2 = "0.10"            # KDF Logic
hkdf = "0.12"            # Key Derivation
x25519-dalek = { version = "2.0", features = ["static_secrets"] } # Classical ECC
pqcrypto-kyber = "0.8"   # Post-Quantum KEM
pqcrypto-traits = "0.3"  # Common traits for PQC

# WebAssembly Runtime
wasmtime = { version = "16.0", features = ["async", "component-model"] }
wasmtime-wasi = "16.0"   # WASI support for filesystem access in Wasm

# Telemetry & Utilities
anyhow = "1.0"           # Simplified error handling for binaries

# --- Build Profiles ---

[profile.release]
opt-level = 3            # Max optimization
lto = "fat"              # Link Time Optimization across all crates (Critical for static linking)
codegen-units = 1        # Slower compile, faster code
panic = "abort"          # Remove stack unwinding for smaller binaries
strip = true             # Strip symbols to reduce size

[profile.dev]
opt-level = 0
debug = true
